active_projects.name: nexus-globe
active_projects.description: The main repository. Voice Gateway, agents, and orchestration layer.

active_projects.name: jarvis
active_projects.description: Personal AI assistant — tools, memory, and task execution.

active_projects.name: philos-orchestrator
active_projects.description: Orientation engine — analysis, models, and insight generation.

architecture.voice_gateway: WebSocket server at ws://127.0.0.1:8765. STT → Adapter → TTS pipeline.
architecture.tts: macOS say (SystemTTS) for development. OpenAI TTS for production.
architecture.stt: MockSTT in development. Whisper (OpenAI) when OPENAI_API_KEY is set.
architecture.session_memory: In-process per WebSocket session. No cross-session persistence yet.

preferences.language: Hebrew in conversation, English in code and commit messages.
